name: INNSUITES HOSPITALITY TRUST
summary: InnSuites Hospitality Trust (IHT) is an unincorporated Ohio real estate investment trust headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, taxed as a C-corporation. It owns interests in two moderate-service InnSuites hotels (Tucson, AZ and Albuquerque, NM) totaling 270 suites, provides hotel management services through majority-owned subsidiary RRF LLLP, offers trademark licensing, and holds a diversified investment in UniGen Power, Inc., a clean energy power generation company.
